title: talantiaios #5006
definition:
1) a weight or worth of a talent
    1a) a talent of silver weighed about 100 pounds (45 kg)
    1b) a talent of gold, 200 pounds (91 kg)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a weight or worth of a talent
    1a) a talent of silver weighed about 100 pounds (45 kg)
    1b) a talent of gold, 200 pounds (91 kg)

    NASB:  worth a talent, i.e. of a talents weight:
